summary: CodeSearchTool now accepts an optional Arc<RwLock<Option<Arc<CodebaseIndex>>>> (SharedCodebaseIndex) at construction time. When the shared index is populated (background task completed), execute() reads it under a read-lock, clones the Arc, drops the lock, and runs the search — zero disk I/O. If the index is not yet ready (still being built) or no shared index was provided, it falls back to the original index_project() call. register_extended_tools() gains a third parameter `shared_index: Option<SharedCodebaseIndex>`; all three call sites in AgentStack (new, reload_tools, stack_run run()) now pass Some(Arc::clone(&self.codebase_index)). Pre-existing compile errors in lint.rs and test_runner.rs (missing scrub_env field) were also fixed to unblock workspace compilation.
